# 领域驱动设计(DDD)

领域驱动设计(DDD) is a core concept in software engineering. Closely related to [[microservices]], [[design-patterns]], [[clean-architecture]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
